title: Repair and overhaul bicycle drivetrain systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair and overhaul bicycle drivetrain systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair bicycle drivetrain system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected using visual and physical methods and compared with manufacturer specifications1.4 Repair options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and repair process, including post-repair testing, is planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected using visual and physical methods and compared with manufacturer specifications1.4 Repair options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and repair process, including post-repair testing, is planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information are accessed and interpreted1.3 Condition of bicycle drivetrain system is inspected using visual and physical methods and compared with manufacturer specifications1.4 Repair options and techniques are identified and confirmed with customer1.5 Replacement parts for drivetrain are identified and sourced as required1.6 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.7 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.8 Work area is prepared and repair process, including post-repair testing, is planned to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair bicycle drivetrain system

elements.title: Carry out repairs to drivetrain system

pcs.text: Bicycle drivetrain system is repaired according to job requirements, manufacturer specifications, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Required replacement parts are checked and fitted according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Operation of repaired drivetrain system is tested and adjusted as required according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Results and quality issues are reported to authorised personnel as required

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out repairs to drivetrain system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and bicycle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
